results.title: E2B Desktop Sandbox
results.description: E2B Desktop Sandbox is an open-source secure virtual desktop that provides isolated, customizable sandboxes for launching applications and streaming their screens, offering features like password protection.

results.title: E2B
results.description: E2B is an open-source infrastructure providing secure, isolated cloud sandboxes (VMs) for running AI-generated code. It enables AI data analysis, code interpretation, and agent environments.

results.title: E2B
results.description: E2B is an open-source infrastructure for running AI-generated code in secure, isolated cloud sandboxes, controllable via JavaScript or Python SDKs.

results.title: E2B Desktop Sandbox SDK
results.description: The E2B Desktop Sandbox SDK provides programmatic access to secure, open-source virtual desktops, enabling users to create, launch applications, and stream virtual computer environments for AI agents and other automated tasks.

results.title: E2B JavaScript SDK
results.description: E2B JavaScript SDK is a software development kit that provides APIs for starting and interacting with sandboxed commands, pseudo-terminals, and file systems in isolated cloud environments.

results.title: E2B Dashboard
results.description: E2B Dashboard is a modern, feature-rich web application built with Next.js 15 and React 19 to manage and monitor E2B services, providing a seamless user experience for managing sandboxes, API keys, and usage analytics.

results.title: Code Interpreter
results.description: E2B Code Interpreter is an open-source infrastructure that allows you to run AI-generated code in secure, isolated sandboxes in the cloud, with SDKs available for JavaScript and Python.

results.title: E2B MCP
results.description: Run Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers securely within E2B sandboxes for safe execution of untrusted tools and code, offering CLI and Python API for AI agents, SaaS, and developer tools.

results.title: vm2
results.description: vm2 is a sandbox that can run untrusted code securely in a single process with your code side by side, offering full control over the sandbox's console output and limited access to process methods.

results.title: Claude Code E2B Sandbox FastAPI Example
results.description: A FastAPI application providing a REST API to run Claude Code commands remotely in E2B sandboxes, featuring session management, GitHub integration, and MCP support for secure, isolated execution.

results.title: Open Computer Use
results.description: Open Computer Use is a secure cloud Linux computer powered by E2B Desktop Sandbox and controlled by open-source LLMs, allowing users to operate a computer via keyboard, mouse, and shell commands.

results.title: CAPE Sandbox
results.description: CAPE Sandbox is an Open Source software for automating the analysis of suspicious files by monitoring the behavior of malicious processes in an isolated environment.

results.title: Windows Sandbox
results.description: Windows Sandbox is a lightweight, disposable desktop environment that safely runs applications in isolation using hypervisor-based virtualization, ideal for testing, debugging, and exploring untrusted files.

results.title: LLM Sandbox
results.description: LLM Sandbox is a lightweight and portable sandbox environment designed to securely execute Large Language Model (LLM) generated code in an isolated mode, offering flexible container backends and multi-language support.

results.title: Tradeprint API Sandbox
results.description: A sandbox environment for the Tradeprint API, allowing customers to interact with API endpoints in preparation for full integration.

results.title: Anthropic Sandbox Runtime
results.description: Anthropic Sandbox Runtime (srt) is a lightweight sandboxing tool that uses native OS primitives (macOS sandbox-exec, Linux bubblewrap) and proxy-based network filtering to enforce filesystem and network restrictions on arbitrary processes at the OS level, enabling safer AI agents.

results.title: OpenSandbox
results.description: OpenSandbox is a universal sandbox platform for AI application scenarios, providing multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox protocols, and sandbox runtimes for LLM-related capabilities.

results.title: s&box
results.description: s&box is a modern sandbox game and development platform, serving as a spiritual successor to Garry's Mod, allowing users to create and play a wide variety of games and experiences.

results.title: S&box
results.description: S&box is a game development engine built on Source 2 that uses C# for coding games and addons, featuring a hotload system for rapid iteration and a scene-based workflow similar to Unity and Godot.

results.title: Sandboxed Python
results.description: Sandboxed Python is a lightweight, secure interpreter for a restricted subset of Python, providing a true, interop-friendly sandbox environment ideal for controlled execution in scenarios like LLM tool calls, serverless functions, or plugin systems.

results.title: s&box
results.description: s&box is a modern game engine built on Valve's Source 2 and .NET technology, providing an intuitive editor for creating games.

results.title: LitterBox
results.description: LitterBox is a controlled sandbox environment for security professionals to develop, test, and validate payloads with advanced static and dynamic analysis capabilities, BYOVD detection, and LLM-assisted insights.

results.title: Sandboxels
results.description: Sandboxels is a free falling sand simulation game featuring hundreds of elements, heat, chemical reactions, fire, density, and electricity.

results.title: E2B Infrastructure
results.description: E2B Infrastructure is an open-source platform providing the underlying infrastructure for E2B's AI code interpreting capabilities, supporting self-hosting with Terraform on various cloud providers like GCP and AWS.

results.title: AIO Sandbox
results.description: AIO Sandbox is an all-in-one agent sandbox environment that unifies browser, shell, file, MCP operations, and VSCode Server within a single Docker container, offering a secure execution environment for AI agents and developers.

results.title: PyWinSandbox
results.description: PyWinSandbox is a Python library that enables the creation and control of Windows Sandbox machines, facilitating sandboxed tests in controlled environments with features like directory mapping, custom configurations, and a shell extension.

results.title: UCloud Sandbox Python SDK
results.description: UCloud Sandbox Python SDK provides a cloud sandbox environment for securely running AI-generated code, offering features like basic command execution, stateful code interpretation, and a desktop environment with VNC streaming.

results.title: Hopx
results.description: Hopx provides secure, isolated cloud sandboxes via official SDKs for safe code execution, particularly for AI agents, testing, and data processing, with sandboxes spinning up in approximately 100ms.

results.title: S&box
results.description: S&box is a game engine coded in C# that uses the Source 2 engine and features a scene system similar to Godot and Unity, with a hotload system for rapid iteration and the ability to export games royalty-free.

results.title: Arrakis
results.description: Arrakis provides a secure, customizable, and self-hosted solution for spawning and managing sandboxes with snapshot-and-restore capabilities for code execution and computer use.
